title: DeviceChain Helm values
description: Apply-time guard for DeviceChain deployment values (ADR-022). Validates the deployment-selection envelope; per-service config is validated fail-closed by each service at load (decision 1).

profile.description: A named profile, or empty to use enabledFunctionalAreas (or fall back to the default profile). 'default' is the standard system; 'full' ships every area.

enabledFunctionalAreas.description: Explicit set of functional areas; mutually exclusive with profile.

name.description: Secret name, rendered in the instance namespace.

stringData.description: Verbatim key→value entries (e.g. a base64 PSK string a service decodes at load).

extraSecrets.description: Extra Opaque Secrets to render into the instance namespace (templates/extra-secrets.yaml), projected into a functional area via its extraEnv secretKeyRef.

id.description: Instance id: becomes DC_INSTANCE_ID and the target namespace, and is the first segment of every messaging subject, the device-plane MQTT topic, and the HTTP ingest route (ADR-048). Constrained to the token safety alphabet (letters, digits, hyphen, underscore) so it cannot inject a subject/MQTT/route metacharacter; the service also fail-closes on a malformed value at startup.

existingSecret.description: C2: name of a pre-created Secret (e.g. External Secrets) holding the instance-config JSON under an `instance` key. When set, the chart mounts it and renders no Secret of its own.

metrics.description: Prometheus scrape integration. enabled renders a ServiceMonitor per area (scraping /metrics on the graphql port); requires the Prometheus Operator CRDs. grafanaDashboards renders the event-processing ops dashboard ConfigMap for the Grafana sidecar; alerts renders a PrometheusRule with the DETECT+REACT alerting rules.

rollingUpdate.description: §10.1: zero-downtime rolling-update strategy. maxUnavailable:0 + maxSurge:1 surges a Ready replacement in before removing an old pod.

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: §10.2: graceful-shutdown window; must exceed shutdownDrainSeconds plus in-flight request time.

shutdownDrainSeconds.description: §10.2: app-side readiness-drain window before the server stops (DC_SHUTDOWN_DRAIN_SECONDS).

goMemLimitPercent.description: GOMEMLIMIT as a percentage of each container's own memory LIMIT. Go derives GOMAXPROCS from the cgroup CPU limit but does NOT derive GOMEMLIMIT from the memory limit. This is a CEILING against an OOMKill during a live-heap spike, not a footprint reduction — measurement found no heap reduction and a GC CPU cost — so it defaults to 0 (off). Capped below 100 deliberately: the cgroup limit also covers goroutine stacks and runtime bookkeeping outside the Go heap, so aiming at the full limit OOMKills instead of collecting.

goMemLimit.description: An explicit GOMEMLIMIT for every area, bypassing goMemLimitPercent. Go's own syntax (e.g. "192MiB"). Prefer the percentage — a pinned value keeps throttling a service whose memory limit was later raised.

resources.description: E7: default container resources; non-empty so pods are not BestEffort QoS.

podSecurityContext.description: C3: pod-level securityContext; hardened defaults run the workload as a non-zero uid with RuntimeDefault seccomp.

securityContext.description: C3: container-level securityContext; hardened defaults drop all capabilities and use a read-only rootfs.

ingress.description: Optional Ingress + cert-manager TLS exposing the GraphQL/HTTP surface (requires the OpenTofu ingress-nginx + cert-manager).

frontend.description: The web console workload: a static nginx SPA served at the ingress root. Disable for headless/ingest-only instances.

blobStorage.description: ADR-058: Kubernetes volume wiring for the filesystem object store. Creates/mounts the PVC that backs instance.config.infrastructure.blob.directory (branding logos today; firmware/OTA + exports later). Ignored for the s3 backend; the render fails on a persistence/backend mismatch.

mountPath.description: Volume mount path; defaults to blob.directory (must match it). Set only when the instance config is supplied via instance.existingSecret and the chart cannot read blob.directory.

mountAreas.description: Functional areas that mount the blob volume at the store directory (default: user-management).

strategy.description: Deployment rollout strategy for this area. Default RollingUpdate. Recreate stops all old pods before starting new ones (no old+new overlap) — required for a single-writer stream processor like event-processing (ADR-051 DETECT), which must also stay at replicas:1.

goMemLimit.description: GOMEMLIMIT for this area only, overriding the derivation. Use for a service whose working set genuinely differs (e.g. event-processing holds more live state than the CRUD areas).

extraPorts.description: Extra Service/container ports for this area beyond the 8080 graphql port (e.g. event-sources HTTP device ingest on 8081). Port names must be <=15 chars per Kubernetes.

protocol.description: Port protocol; defaults to TCP. lwm2m-ingest sets UDP for its CoAPS port.

extraEnv.description: Extra container environment variables for this area, passed through verbatim as core-v1 EnvVar entries. Used to project a Secret into an env var — e.g. sparkplug-ingest reads each per-tenant broker password from the env var its source's broker.passwordEnv names, so an operator sets an entry here with valueFrom.secretKeyRef.
